subject: Human Resources
title: Whistleblower Protections
description: A fast breakdown of Whistleblower Protections for builders.

hook.text: Sherron Watkins warned Enron's CEO about accounting fraud. She was ignored. When it collapsed, 20,000 people lost their jobs.

buildup.text: Whistleblower laws protect employees who report illegal activity—from fraud and safety violations to discrimination.

discovery.text: Federal protections include Sarbanes-Oxley, Dodd-Frank, and OSHA's whistleblower statutes—covering many industries.

twist.text: Despite legal protection, whistleblowers still face retaliation—demotions, isolation, and career destruction.

climax.text: Dodd-Frank added financial incentives—whistleblowers can receive 10-30% of SEC sanctions exceeding $1 million.

punchline.text: Whistleblowers risk everything. Protecting them protects everyone.

quiz.question: What incentive does Dodd-Frank provide for whistleblowers?
